markdown:
#  Assign a User as a Bid Contact in Your Free Procore Account (iOS) 
##### Limited Release
The Team tool is currently only available to users in the United States who have a free Procore account via the [Procore Construction Network](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-construction-network).
##  Things to Consider 
  * To have a free Procore account, become a part of the [Procore Construction Network ](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-construction-network)(PCN).
  * Though you can use the Procore app to assign a user as a bid contact, the Bidding tool is a desk-top only feature.
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'System Administrator' permissions for the Procore Construction Network account.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Team** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.  
_Note:_ Find the 'Team' tool on any of your app's main pages: Sidebar screen, Home screen, or Project Overview screen.
  2. Click the name of the user you want to assign as a Bid Contact.  
_Note:_ If the user has not been added to the Team list yet, see [Add a User to Your Free Procore Account (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-ios/tutorials/add-a-user-to-your-free-procore-account-ios).
  3. Click the **edit**
  4. Under 'Assign as Bid Contact', toggle to on ![Icon Toggle On Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fb1d6fea405ea19d57a244a0ecfea9e3/cf847e2b72e9bfee33e2b5a68b0a3419/icon-toggle-on-android.png?fm=webp&h=24)
  5. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Add a User to Your Free Procore Account (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-ios/tutorials/add-a-user-to-your-free-procore-account-ios)
  * [Team (iOS) - Overview](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-ios)
  * [View Users in Your Free Procore Account (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-ios/tutorials/view-users-in-your-free-procore-account-ios)
title: Assign a User as a Bid Contact in Your Free Procore Account (iOS)
description: How to designate a team member as a Bid Contact in the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
